security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
The system does not employ any mechanism to prevent the submission of duplicate votes from the same actor in a given voting period

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation. Implement rate limiting and anti-replay mechanisms.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious actors could alter vote data before submission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can tamper with proposal data.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Data integrity checks are insufficient before votes are processed.

assumptions: The system does not validate the integrity of the vote data before it is processed by the governance contract.
The attacker has access to modify the data sent to the governance contract before the signature is added

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks to prevent vote tampering and data corruption. Utilize secure communication protocols.

description: An attacker may alter the vote data before submission, leading to manipulation of voting results.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of proper audit trail to track voters and their votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor can repudiate their vote due to a lack of accountability.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not maintain a verifiable audit trail of votes cast.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record detailed information about vote origin, timestamp, and user identity.
There is no mechanism for tamper-evident logging of votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a robust audit trail that records all voting activities with verifiable timestamps and user identities.

description: Voters may deny having cast a vote, or their votes may be hard to verify.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can potentially access sensitive voting information.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is not adequately protected from unauthorized access during transmission or storage.

assumptions: The voting system does not encrypt vote data during transmission or at rest.
The system does not implement appropriate access control measures to protect vote data from unauthorized disclosure.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption to protect vote data during transmission and at rest. Secure storage of vote data and access control measures.

description: An attacker may gain access to voting data through various means, potentially compromising voter privacy.
